focus_areas: KV cache compression for reasoning models (8 papers)
CoT faithfulness and hidden computation (7 papers)
K-V asymmetry and head specialization (7 papers)

key_finding: Reasoning Theater (2603.05488) confirms answers decodable from hidden states 80% earlier than text reveals — direct confirmation of lossy projection hypothesis. Causal Bypass (2602.03994) shows CMI≈0 bypass regimes where text has zero causal influence. K>V now 6-angle confirmed including low-rank K-manifold geometry. Per-head RL policies (KVP, RLKV) independently confirm head specialization. R-KV/TRIM-KV show removing scaffolding can IMPROVE accuracy. Warning: our 'recent' universality may be post-hoc-masking-specific (H2O+SnapKV-D better for real-time decoding).
evidence_impact: Strengthens core hypothesis with 3 new independent confirmation angles. Adds mechanistic insight: K cache low-rank manifold explains digital encoding. Identifies deployment limitation of our compression findings.
next_planned: Effective rank analysis of K vs V cache (test low-rank prediction); real-time eviction benchmark (not post-hoc masking); CMI measurement for CoT mediation index

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models. Now 6-angle confirmed.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama. Independently confirmed by RLKV and KVP.

natural_usage.status: DECISIVE for post-hoc: 'Recent' 134/134 pooled [97.3%, 100%]. CAVEAT: may not generalize to real-time decoding (Hold Onto That Thought).

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + low-rank K-manifold geometry explains digital/analog.

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 6 scans, 65+ papers, 6-angle K>V confirmation, independent head specialization replication, Reasoning Theater + Causal Bypass confirm hidden computation.
